rationale: Control case (answer key: group=control). Dim1: output gives misstatement_probability=35; control band 30<p<50 → 1 (not ≤30 for full credit). Dim2: control → null; output appropriately has empty mechanism_hypotheses, consistent with p<40. Dim3: control → nulls. Dim4: risk_tier 'watch' is consistent with p=35 (<40 requires clear/watch), so no cap. Evidence cites specific provided data points with values/dates/accessions (CL1: AR 63,246k→65,442k→85,884k vs revenues 435,192k→398,868k→463,451k FY2023–25; CL3: NI vs OCF for FY2023–25; CL5: specific quarterly losses), and combines multi-year/multi-statement points coherently (AR-vs-revenue divergence rates, goodwill flat since 2017 vs revenue decline from $1.0B to ~$400M, three-year NI/OCF comparison) → 3. Minor blemish: CL2 quotes Goodwill=120,154k (2017) while top_signals says 'flat at $120,343,000 since 2017' — small inconsistency, not score-changing. Memorization condition2: false — reasoning anchors on concrete provided data content, and no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement/outcome facts appear (NT 10-K, 10-K/A, 15-12G are filing-chronology items within provided data).
